title: +
content:
+
+## Evolution and Adaptation
+
+Language is dynamic. RLOS includes **drift detection** to monitor linguistic change, **innovation integration** to incorporate emerging phenomena, **extinction prevention** for endangered features, and **cross‑pollination** across varieties【3†L165-L185】. A meta‑learning controller performs recursive self‑improvement—analysing its own processes, evolving categorisation schemes and adapting visualisation strategies based on user interactions. Feedback loops capture user corrections and performance metrics; adaptation and learning modules adjust the model, and a system evolution component updates the hypergraph and modules accordingly (as shown in the flow diagram).
+
+## Comparative Synthesis of AI Responses
+
+The four AI responses converge on several key themes:
+
+- **Layered, modular design**: All frameworks (Grok, Gemini, Perplexity and Copilot) emphasised a stacked architecture. Gemini supplied visuals of the layered OS and multimodal vector spaces, while Grok and Perplexity proposed hypergraph/plexus control and meta‑learning loops【33635101037775†L33-L68】【33635101037775†L253-L272】.
